response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure experience with relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools. While his direct GenAI/RAG experience is limited, his technical leadership, cloud platform familiarity, and production-grade system development align well with the role's core requirements. His open-source contributions and mentorship further bolster his candidacy.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Python-adjacent languages (DLang, Node.js), and cloud platforms (AWS).
Proven technical leadership in customer-facing roles, including mentorship and cross-functional collaboration (e.g., at re:cinq and Optilyz).
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, directly relevant to the role's focus on agentic workflows.
concerns: Limited explicit experience with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) architectures or vector databases in production.
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI/CS, though this is a preferred qualification.
Diverse but fragmented project history may raise questions about depth in GenAI-specific domains.
